# VForm 3 Official Build Source

This local package is built from the official `vform666/variant-form3-vite` repository.

- Repository: https://github.com/vform666/variant-form3-vite
- Branch: `master`
- Commit: `c67479e496bab56a93a3dff168a4f529d8293c67`
- Build date: 2026-06-04
- Commands:
  - `npm install --registry=https://registry.npmmirror.com`
  - `npm run lib`
  - `npm run lib-render`

It replaces the published `vform3-builds@3.0.10` package because the npm package is older than the current official source build and is missing newer component options such as `static-text` `textAlign`, `fontSize`, and `preWrap`.
